chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-762 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For orders on MA 6507/23 3.For hearing of main case 30-04-2024 Mr. Khan Muhammad Shaikh, Advocate along with applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy P.G. ***** After arguing the matter at some length, learned counsel for applicant submits that applicant would avail remedy of Crl. Direct Complaint in accordance with law. In view of above, this Crl. Misc. Application along with listed application is dismissed in the above terms as not pressed. JUDGE Ahmad
